description_long: This street food stall features a compact, wheeled cart structure with a yellow corrugated roof and a prominent front sign in Thai script, accented with red and green graphics. The main cart is equipped with a large serving counter, cooking area, and several containers and utensils visible on the countertop. Two blue tables with matching stools are set up in front of the stall for customers, each table holding napkin dispensers and condiments. A large round blue basin is placed to the side, possibly for washing or waste. The stall includes a red beverage dispenser and various cooking implements, such as a griddle and storage containers. The overall setup is designed for quick street-side food service, with bright, inviting colors and practical, easy-to-clean surfaces.
description: A vibrant street food stall with a yellow roof, Thai signage, blue tables and stools, and a well-equipped serving counter for food preparation and service.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow roof, large Thai sign, serving counter, and two blue tables with stools arranged for customers.
description_view_1: Slightly angled view highlighting the cart's wheels, countertop equipment, and the arrangement of tables and stools in front.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cart, the red beverage dispenser, and the blue basin to the side, with tables visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the serving counter, food preparation area, and the blue basin on the right side.
attribute_signage: Large yellow rectangular sign with red and green Thai text and a bowl logo, mounted on the front roof fascia; bold, colorful, and highly visible.
attribute_serving_counter: A wide, rectangular counter made of metal or plastic, spanning the front of the cart, with space for food preparation, serving, and utensils; no glass shield is visible.
attribute_food_display: Food items and ingredients are openly arranged on the counter in containers and trays, easily visible and accessible to customers, with no protective covering.
